imgCredit: Church Interior - Bartholomeus Johannes van Hove
name: Holy site discovered in %HEX_NAME
description:
Within the %LOCATION_NAME %PERSON_NAME is suddenly thrown to the ground in violent spasms, shouting in a language that brings the animals to guard %him in %his vulnerable state. %He regains consciousness surrounded by confused commoners, a collection of livestock and nervous guards.

Your agent saw a vision of an intense ray of light erupting from beneath %HEX_NAME and %he wastes no time gathering tools and convincing workers to join %him in the blessed task of unearthing it.

choices.name: Begin the dig
choices.description: Exploration Percentage is increased by 20%. Local Faith modifier is increased by 10.
